forbidden.name: contracts-must-not-depend-on-pi
forbidden.comment: packages/contracts must not import from @earendil-works (Pi packages)

forbidden.name: contracts-must-not-depend-on-core
forbidden.comment: packages/contracts must not import from packages/core

forbidden.name: no-circular-contracts-core-adapters
forbidden.comment: No circular dependencies between contracts, core, and adapters
